title: How do I round down a currency formula?
excerpt:
Hi There!

posts.author: Chrystle (Chrystle)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi There!

I have a formula to determine the price per day: “DIVIDE({Cost Per State},365)”. Unfortunately, it is populating to the third decimal. Because this is for billing purposes, I need it to round to two decimal places. Is there a way to change the formula to accommodate this?
